metadata.title: Image Converter
metadata.description: Convert, compress and resize images from one format to another by dragging and dropping or pasting into the note. HEIC, TIF, JPG, WEBP, PNG.

regex.source: .setDesc("Non-destructive resizing in Reading Mode is only visual, thus if it is too distractive you can disable it")
regex.target: .setDesc("在阅读模式中的非破坏性调整仅为视觉效果，因此如果它过于分散注意力，您可以禁用它。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Show processing status report when multiple images were detected e.g.: When enabled it will show "Processing 1 of 20" ')
regex.target: .setDesc('检测到多张图片时显示处理状态报告，例如：启用后将显示“正在处理 1/20”。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the mode to use when resizing the image. Resizing an image will further reduce file-size, but it will resize your actual file, which means that the original file will be modified, and the changes will be permanent.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择调整图像大小时要使用的模式。调整图像大小将进一步减小文件大小，但它将调整您的实际文件，这意味着原始文件将被修改，更改将是永久性的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Selecting this will skip images that already are in the target format. This is useful if you have a very large library, and want to process images in batches.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择此选项将跳过已经是目标格式的图片。如果您有一个非常庞大的图片库，并且希望批量处理图片，这将非常有用。")

regex.source: text:"Below settings allow you to specify how long Obsidian should 												wait before timing-out the image processing. E.g.: when file is extra												large 100MB+ it might freeze Obsidian - Image Converter will try to do												the best it can to process it - however if it takes too long it will stop"
regex.target: text:"以下设置允许您指定 Obsidian 在超时图像处理之前应等待的时间。例如：当文件超大 100MB+ 时，它可能会冻结 Obsidian - Image Converter 将尝试尽最大努力处理它 - 但是，如果时间过长，它会停止。"

regex.source: Notice("No processing needed: All vault images are either in skip list or kept in original format with no compression or resizing.")
regex.target: Notice("无需处理：所有库图像要么以跳过列表的形式保存，要么以原始格式保存，无需压缩或调整大小。")

regex.source: text:'Below settings allow you to adjust image dimensions using the standard ObsidianMD\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmethod by modifying image links. For instance, to change the width of ![[Engelbart.jpg]],\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\twe add "| 100" at the end, resulting in ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]'
regex.target: text:'以下设置允许您通过修改图片链接来调整图片尺寸,使用标准的 ObsidianMD 方法。例如,要更改 ![[Engelbart.jpg]] 的宽度,我们在末尾添加 "| 100",结果为 ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]'

regex.source: text:"Running this will modify all your internal images in the Vault. Please create backups. All internal image links will be automatically updated."
regex.target: text:"运行此操作将修改保险库中的所有内部图片。请创建备份。所有内部图片链接将自动更新。"

regex.source: text:"⚠️ This will modify all images in the current note. Please ensure you have backups."
regex.target: text:"⚠️ 这将修改当前笔记中的所有图片。请确保您已创建备份。"
.setText(`正在处理第 ${i} 项,共 ${e} 项`)

regex.target: .setDesc("替换 - 用新文件替换目标位置中已存在的文件。\t\t\t\t\t重命名 - 自动在文件末尾添加 '-1, -2, -3 等' 后缀")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the default size which should be applied on all dropped/pasted images. For example, if you specify \t\t\t\t\t\t\tcustom size as '250' then when you drop or paste an 'image.jpg' it would become ![[image.jpg | 250]] ")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定应应用于所有拖放或粘贴图片的默认尺寸。例如,如果您指定自定义尺寸为 '250',则当您拖放或粘贴 'image.jpg' 时,它将变为 ![[image.jpg | 250]]")
super("".concat(i," 'options.signal' 处于 '已中止' 状态")

regex.source: text:"Below settings allow you to specify how long Obsidian should \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\twait before timing-out the image processing. E.g.: when file is extra\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlarge 100MB+ it might freeze Obsidian - Image Converter will try to do\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tthe best it can to process it - however if it takes too long it will stop"
regex.target: text:"以下设置允许您指定 Obsidian 在超时图像处理之前应等待的时间。例如:当文件超大 100MB+ 时,它可能会冻结 Obsidian - Image Converter 将尝试尽最大努力处理它 - 但是,如果时间过长,它会停止。"

regex.source: text:'Below settings allow you to adjust image dimensions using the standard ObsidianMD													method by modifying image links. For instance, to change the width of ![[Engelbart.jpg]],													we add "| 100" at the end, resulting in ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]'
regex.target: text:'以下设置允许您通过修改图像链接的标准 ObsidianMD 方法来调整图像尺寸。例如，要更改 ![[Engelbart.jpg]] 的宽度，我们在末尾添加"| 100"，结果为 ![[Engelbart.jpg | 100]]。'

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose how images should be resized. Note: Results are permanent.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择图片应如何调整大小。注意：结果是永久性的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Controls how images are adjusted relative to target size:")
regex.target: .setDesc("控制图片相对于目标尺寸的调整方式：")
.setDesc("跳过匹配这些模式的文件 (逗号分隔)")

regex.source:
.setTooltip("Fit: Maintains aspect ratio within dimensions
Fill: Exactly matches dimensions
Longest Edge: Limits the longest side
Shortest Edge: Limits the shortest side
Width/Height: Constrains single dimension")
regex.target:
.setTooltip("适应：在尺寸内保持纵横比
填充：完全匹配尺寸
最长边：限制最长边
最短边：限制最短边
宽度/高度：限制单个维度")

regex.source:
.setTooltip("Supports multiple pattern types:

1. Glob patterns:
   *.png, draft-*, test-?.jpg
   * = any characters
   ? = single character

2. Regular expressions:
   /pattern/ or r/pattern/ or regex:pattern

Examples:
 *.png (all PNG files)
 draft-* (files starting with draft-)
 /^IMG_\d{4}\./ (IMG_ followed by 4 digits)
 r/\.(jpe?g|png)$/ (files ending in .jpg/.jpeg/.png)
 regex:^(draft|temp)- (files starting with draft- or temp-)")
regex.target:
.setTooltip("支持多种模式类型：

1. 通配符模式：
   *.png, draft-*, test-?.jpg
   * = 任意字符
   ? = 单个字符

2. 正则表达式：
   /pattern/ 或 r/pattern/ 或 regex:pattern

示例：
 *.png（所有PNG文件）
 draft-*（以 draft- 开头的文件）
 /^IMG_\d{4}\./（以 IMG_ 后跟 4 位数字开头）
 r/\.(jpe?g|png)$/（以 .jpg/.jpeg/.png 结尾的文件）
 regex:^(draft|temp)-（以 draft- 或 temp- 开头的文件）")

regex.source: text:"Image position cache stores information about image alignments and sizes. Large caches might impact performance."
regex.target: text:"图片位置缓存存储有关图片对齐和大小的信息。较大的缓存可能会影响性能。"
text:`当前缓存大小: ${i.notes} 条笔记, ${i.images} 张图片`
